name: tmux-session-recovery
description: Record which Claude Code session id runs in each tmux pane, so an unexpected tmux restart no longer loses the pane-to-session mapping. A SessionStart hook stamps the pane with its session id and appends a positional log row; a companion reader maps restored panes back to their `claude --resume <id>` by pane position, which disambiguates even when many sessions share one working directory.
